name: PhanSpeed
description: Dell thermal/power control as a Quick Settings pill — three missions (🧊 Cool, 🔥 Perf, 🔋 Endure) with an intensity dial. Endure keeps the laptop alive on a power trickle: closed-loop CPU cap to break-even, dGPU sleep, panel/kbd trims. Requires the phanspeedd daemon (https://github.com/asuramaya/phanspeed).
